patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.changes: We are changing the crafting requirement for the Heat Sword to require a Neurode rather than a Neural Sensor. Originally, this was meant to incentivize players to explore new nodes, but we want to get better gear in players hands earlier! This change is smaller than most, but meaningful to new players looking to upgrade their melee early on.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Sheev and Dual Heat Sword Rivens.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 13
patchlogs.fixes: Fix a progression stopping issue in the Once Awake quest if the player switched their active quest before claiming the Heat Sword Blueprint, and then built and sold the Heat Sword before ever switching Once Awake back to being an active quest.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the melee slam radius of Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords and Dex Dakra in pvp

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Cronus, Dakra Prime, Dark Sword, Ether Sword, Heat Sword, Jaw Sword, Mire, Pangolin, Ether Reaper, Hate, Reaper Prime, and Plasma Sword can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Brightened the visual effect of the Jat Kattag and Heat Sword’s slam attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes:
The following weapons are now available for use in Conclave:  Dera, Dera Vandal, Boltor, Boltor Prime, Tonfa, Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords, Glaive, Glaive Prime, Kestrel, Fragor, Wraith Karak.
The Heat Sword has been given a tremendous visual overhaul!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the weapon trail for the main hand Dual Heat Sword being dagger sized, inside of sword sized.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Heat Dagger and Dual Heat Swords now deal Fire damage with Charge Attacks and Ground Slams

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 - "make Love, Not War(Frame)"
patchlogs.fixes: Dual Heat Sword charge attack fixed

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfix 6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Dual Heat Swords: slice with twice the power!
